headline: This build focuses on the remaining component-level signs of a prototype—tightening top-bar chrome, section headers, cards, search and filter rows, sticky actions, and the mobile dock so Ryokoplan reads more like a finished product across web and mobile.
notes: Unifies control sizing and spacing across language switches, nav chips, pills, buttons, search inputs, sticky actions, and filter rows so the UI behaves like one mature product system.
Refines section headers, hero spacing, card proportions, media ratios, and body rhythm to reduce early-prototype feel and make Home, Magazine, and My Trips read more editorial and intentional.
Improves real-world usability on mobile with calmer dock sizing, cleaner sticky action density, better search-row wrapping, and more believable first-fold spacing on smaller screens.
